description:
100% Open Source Toolkit for Large Language Models: Train, Tune, Chat on your own Machine

Transformer Lab is a free, open-source LLM workspace that you can run on your own computer. It is designed to go beyond what most modern open LLM applications allow. Using Transformer Lab you can easily finetune, evaluate, export and test LLMs across different inference engines and platforms.
- Major update to CUDA and torch in order to add support for NVIDIA 50 series GPUS
- new MLX PPO Trainer plugin!
- ability to run 4-bit bitsandbytes models in fastchat
Bug fixes
- local and generated datasets viewing doesn’t throw an error
- ability to manually set fallback context length used by MLX
- names of task templates update correctly
What's Changed
- Fix internal error on Datasets tab due to name field by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/444
- Add/further sdk cleanup by @aliasaria in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/447
- Add logic to filter experimental plugins by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/451
- Fix rendering of eval and generate configs on update by @deep1401 in https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/pull/455
Full Changelog: https://github.com/transformerlab/transformerlab-app/compare/v0.15.2...v0.16.0
